(xxxi) Lords of IX and X counted from the Lagna —

be m conjunction, in mutual reception (i.e. each occupying the

(xxxii) If Saturn be posited in Aquarius-Ascendant, and if
four others be in their exaltation; if Mercury be in Anes-Ascend-
ant. and if Jupiter be exalted.
(xxxiii) If the Moon be in Taurus-Ascendant aspected by
the remaining six planets; if one planet be in exaltation and the
rest in their own or friendly signs.
(xxxiv) If Jupiter conjoined with Mars and the Moon occupies
Vargottamamsa or Puskaramsau or if the full Moon occupies
the 10th house and receives the aspect of benefics.
